/usr/bin/ar qc liblibh5cpp-libdeflate-static.a CMakeFiles/libh5cpp-libdeflate-static.dir/v1.25.0/lib/adler32.c.o CMakeFiles/libh5cpp-libdeflate-static.dir/v1.25.0/lib/crc32.c.o CMakeFiles/libh5cpp-libdeflate-static.dir/v1.25.0/lib/deflate_compress.c.o CMakeFiles/libh5cpp-libdeflate-static.dir/v1.25.0/lib/deflate_decompress.c.o CMakeFiles/libh5cpp-libdeflate-static.dir/v1.25.0/lib/gzip_compress.c.o CMakeFiles/libh5cpp-libdeflate-static.dir/v1.25.0/lib/gzip_decompress.c.o CMakeFiles/libh5cpp-libdeflate-static.dir/v1.25.0/lib/utils.c.o CMakeFiles/libh5cpp-libdeflate-static.dir/v1.25.0/lib/zlib_compress.c.o CMakeFiles/libh5cpp-libdeflate-static.dir/v1.25.0/lib/zlib_decompress.c.o CMakeFiles/libh5cpp-libdeflate-static.dir/v1.25.0/lib/x86/cpu_features.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib liblibh5cpp-libdeflate-static.a
